name: circuit-next
description: Claude Code plugin that runs configurable developer workflows. Phase 2 wired state: `/circuit:explore` invokes the full explore workflow (Frame → Analyze → Synthesize → Review → Close) end-to-end via the project CLI; `/circuit:run` routes every task to `/circuit:explore` during the single-workflow phase — full classifier lands at plan slice P2.8. Future phases add `build`, `repair`, `migrate`, `sweep`, and user-authored custom workflows with per-step model + reasoning-effort + skills configuration.

commands.name: circuit:run
commands.description: Routes every task to the `explore` workflow during the single-workflow phase of Phase 2. Full classifier lands at plan slice P2.8; until then this command is a pass-through to `/circuit:explore`.

commands.name: circuit:explore
commands.description: Investigate, understand, choose among options, or shape an execution plan. Runs the full-spine explore workflow end-to-end via the project CLI, producing a canonical event log + result artifact under the run root.
